---
title: "Resources"
description: "A professional collection of research resources, workshops, and technical notes in Geospatial Science and AI."
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    <script src="../assets/js/system-init.js"></script>
---

# Research Resources

Explore curated content spanning modern geospatial technologies, machine learning workshops, and cloud-native analysis frameworks. These resources are designed for researchers and advanced practitioners.

::: {.innovation-section}

::: {.innovation-grid}

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="../images/resource2.jpg" class="nolightbox">

::: {.innovation-card-label}
ML for Remote Sensing (ICLR 2023)
:::

::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Comprehensive summary and resources from the ICLR 2023 Workshop. Includes keynote insights and accepted research papers focused on Earth observation.
:::

::: {.innovation-card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Read More](ml-remote-sensing.qmd){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="../images/cloud_gis_course.png" class="nolightbox">

::: {.innovation-card-label}
Cloud GIS & Open Source
:::

::: {.innovation-card-desc}
A critical transition guide from proprietary cloud platforms to open-source libraries like Python and R. Focuses on sustainability and reproducibility.
:::

::: {.innovation-card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Read More](cloud-gis.qmd){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::

:::

:::

<br>

## Additional Material

For further technical documentation, visit the [Courses](../courses.qmd) section or explore my [Blog](../blog.qmd) for latest research updates.
